Title: Sleeping Kitten on Stack of Books Drawing
Description:
A delightful and charming line drawing of a cozy kitten peacefully sleeping atop a stack of books. This minimalist illustration captures a perfect moment of rest and tranquility, making it a sweet and thoughtful piece of wall decor or stationery.

Whether you are a book lover, a cat owner, or simply someone who appreciates simple, comforting art, this design will add a touch of heartwarming charm to any space.

✨ Perfect For:

  • Book Nooks and Libraries
  • Nursery and Kid's Room Decor
  • Cat Lovers' Gifts
  • Crafting and Scrapbooking
  • Adding a cozy, comforting vibe to your home

🎁 Ideal Gift:

This art print makes a wonderful gift for students, teachers, new cat owners, or anyone who needs a little moment of peace. It's a universally appealing piece of art that brings warmth and calm.

The simple black line art style is versatile and pairs beautifully with various interior design aesthetics, from farmhouse chic to modern minimalist.
